sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58398" key="koinoga/mia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοινο-γάμια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n58398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">promiscuous concubinage</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
